title: Using AI for Competitive Intelligence
description: Our team developed a workflow using AI to scrape and summarize competitor press releases and product announcements. The process takes 15 minutes instead of 2 hours of manual work.
author: Alex Kim

title: Prompt Pattern: Role-Based Output Control
description: A technique for controlling output format by assigning the AI a specific role with detailed responsibilities. Works across all major LLM providers.
author: Maria Santos

title: Lessons Learned: When AI Hallucinations Cost Us Time
description: A candid post-mortem on an AI-generated report that contained factual errors. Key takeaways on validation, human oversight, and when NOT to use AI.
author: David Park

title: Quick Tip: Context Windows Are Your Friend
description: Pro tip: Always include relevant context from previous messages in your prompts. Even with large context windows, providing explicit context improves accuracy by 30-50%.
author: Rachel Foster
